_comment: Day-power × day-rhythm combos, set 1/3 (Self · Allies · Joy · Ideas) · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026) · meanings follow the classical almanac canon and the ten-power teachings

比肩|建.title: Plant your own flag
比肩|建.text: That thing you've wanted to start on your own for so long — put the first stake in the ground today. Don't wait for anyone's green light; your own strength is enough. Asking for funding or borrowing someone else's muscle isn't today's move though. Go solo for now and it will fall into place.

比肩|除.title: Drop the dead weight
比肩|除.text: Habits that hold you back, burdens you've been carrying for other people until your back bends — today is the best day to cut them loose. Clear your desk, clear your calendar, take your time back. Travel light and you move fast.

比肩|滿.title: Tank full of energy
比肩|滿.text: Body and spirit are at full power — anything that takes your own muscle, go for it. Getting the old crew of kindred spirits together feels extra lively too. Just don't let a dare drag you into pointless contests. Save the strength for your own goals.

比肩|平.title: Run at your own pace
比肩|平.text: Solo routine work flows unusually well today. Redo your schedule, work out, get your own systems in order. An ordinary day for quietly stacking up points — nobody else has to notice. You will.

比肩|定.title: A deal among equals
比肩|定.text: Deals where you stand eye to eye with the other side settle nicely today. Fifty-fifty partnerships, clear lines on who does what — agree it now and both sides stay comfortable for a long time.

比肩|執.title: Finish your own list
比肩|執.text: That backlog you've been putting off — bite through it one item at a time today. No waiting on the team, no waiting for anyone to be free. Your own two hands are the best tools you've got. By tonight you'll be proud the list is half as long.

比肩|破.title: Walk away from the wrong room
比肩|破.text: The contract that shortchanges you, the circle that drains you — today you can walk away, clean and final. Don't start anything new, don't sign anything new. Today is for ending things properly, not beginning them.

比肩|危.title: Confident, not cocky
比肩|危.text: Self-confidence is your strength — and today, your trap. Don't bet your name on anything you haven't seen in full. Double-check before you hit confirm. Slowing down just a little saves the whole board.

比肩|成.title: Claim what you built
比肩|成.text: Something you've poured your own sweat into is finally blooming. Close it out in style and put your name on it, out loud. This credit is yours — take it, no blushing.

比肩|收.title: Collect what's yours
比肩|收.text: Money you lent, things people borrowed, benefits you never claimed — today they come back easily. And the work you scattered across many hands? Pull it back and do it yourself; it'll be faster.

比肩|開.title: Announce yourself
比肩|開.text: Launch the thing you made yourself, take the freelance gig, enter the competition, raise your hand for the opportunity. Speak in your own name today and people listen. Your voice carries — no spokesperson needed.

比肩|閉.title: Recharge your own battery
比肩|閉.text: Skip the socializing, skip the meetups. Keep your energy and your money close, and spend a quiet day with something you love. The strength you bank today funds the next battle. People who know how to rest are the ones who go far.

劫財|建.title: Build the team
劫財|建.text: Starting something that needs many hands? Invite the right people today and it catches fire fast. But write the money rules down from day one. The closer the friend, the clearer the paper needs to be.

劫財|除.title: Clear the air in the group
劫財|除.text: Lingering tension in the team, little debts between friends — today they settle cleanly, no hard feelings. And the person who's been draining the group for too long? Time for a kind goodbye. The circle will breathe easier immediately.

劫財|滿.title: A crowd around you
劫財|滿.text: Parties, gatherings, connections rolling in nonstop. But days like this are exactly when the wallet leaks. Set a budget before you leave the house — and if anyone pitches you a group investment today, always say you'll sleep on it.

劫財|平.title: Divide and conquer
劫財|平.text: Group work runs smooth and drama-free today — split the tasks and it's done fast. A great day for coordinating in every direction: give each person what they do best, and don't quietly pick up other people's work to carry yourself.

劫財|定.title: Settle the split
劫財|定.text: Money shares, equity, credit — whatever's been hanging, nail it down today. And it has to end up on paper, nothing less. A verbal agreement today is next month's brand-new problem.

劫財|執.title: Check what others are holding
劫財|執.text: Work you left with a friend, money someone else is holding, documents out on loan — run through the list today, item by item. Don't leave important things in other people's hands longer than necessary.

劫財|破.title: No money talk with friends
劫財|破.text: The risk of a blowup in your circle is sky-high today. Money between friends is strictly off the table — postpone the conversation. But if there's a group you know deep down isn't right for you, today is the cleanest day to step out for good.

劫財|危.title: Don't vouch for anyone
劫財|危.text: Co-signing a loan, lending a large sum, signing in a friend's place — all three are off today. In company, listen a lot and say little. Secrets that slip out today travel faster than usual.

劫財|成.title: Win as a team
劫財|成.text: The work you built together is paying off today. Celebrate together and spread the credit to every hand that helped. Generosity today is seed money for the team's next campaign.

劫財|收.title: Settle the group tab
劫財|收.text: Pooled money, expenses covered for each other, shares friends are still holding — collect and reconcile today until everyone's numbers match. Clean books today mean friendships that last through next year.

劫財|開.title: Open the circle
劫財|開.text: Launch the joint project, grow the team, post the job opening. Good people walk in on their own today — so announce it loudly. The circle you open today attracts the kind who stay.

劫財|閉.title: Wallet closed, circle closed
劫財|閉.text: Skip the night out. Money leaks fastest today when you're in the middle of a crowd. Stay in with a few close people instead. Tonight, quiet is a lot cheaper than fun.

食神|建.title: Start something that feeds your soul
食神|建.text: A creative project, a hobby, a cooking class, the backyard garden — anything that makes you genuinely happy is worth starting today. It will go the distance, because it starts from joy, not obligation.

食神|除.title: Wash the stress off
食神|除.text: A massage, a spa day, light exercise, decluttering the house — and anything you've been forcing yourself through, cut it today. Stress drains out easier today than any other day. Don't let it sleep over.

食神|滿.title: Full table, warm house
食神|滿.text: Throw the celebration, cook for the people you love, hold the happy family occasion. The mood couldn't be more on your side — and kids at the gathering bring extra luck. Today's fullness reaches the heart, not just the stomach.

食神|平.title: Easy day — don't overbook
食神|平.text: Cook something delicious, take a walk, savor a light task you enjoy. Life wants a slower tempo today, so don't cram the calendar. Simplicity is today's gift. Take it.

食神|定.title: Close the deal over lunch
食神|定.text: Take the business talk somewhere relaxed — lunch or dinner is today's best meeting room. Things that stay tense across the conference table settle with surprising ease across the dining table.

食神|執.title: Slow hands, fine work
食神|執.text: Craftwork and creative pieces that need every corner polished — your hands are steady and your patience deep today. Work slowly, taste as you go, keep refining. Good things are never finished fast, and today you're in no hurry.

食神|破.title: Stop forcing the fun
食神|破.text: That activity you used to love but now leaves you drained — today you're allowed to admit it and set it down. Don't smile through the exhaustion. Give yourself the empty space back; new joy needs somewhere to land.

食神|危.title: Enjoy it — with a ceiling
食神|危.text: Treats, sweets, the shopping cart: today's classic traps. Enjoy yourself, but set the limit before you start. Eat and drink in moderation, and tomorrow morning your wallet and your waistline will both thank you.

食神|成.title: Release it and watch the love
食神|成.text: The creative work you've been nurturing is ready right on time. Put it out there — the response will be warmer than you expect. Work made with joy carries its own fragrance, and people can tell.

食神|收.title: The work you love starts paying
食神|收.text: Income from your craft, your content, the little shop you built with heart — today it collects nicely. And that recipe or trick you just discovered? Write it down and file it away to build on.

食神|開.title: Open the shop, launch the menu
食神|開.text: Open the store, debut the new menu, post your first piece of content, launch a class teaching what you love. Your charm pulls people in on its own today. A door opened with a smile never lacks visitors.

食神|閉.title: Quiet happiness
食神|閉.text: An early night, a home-cooked meal, the movie you never finished. Happiness doesn't need hunting today — it's already in the house. Rest until you're full. Tomorrow can wait.

傷官|建.title: Launch the bold plan
傷官|建.text: The one-of-a-kind idea sitting in your drawer — today, sketch it into a real plan. Your mind is unusually fast and sharp. Break the mold, but break it with style. Don't step on anyone's toes as you pull away.

傷官|除.title: Tear out the slow old way
傷官|除.text: The workflow that's been sluggish forever — rip it out today and rewrite it clean. Delete the junk steps without a shred of regret. Your head is sharp enough to see exactly what's excess and what's missing. Get to it.

傷官|滿.title: Full room, all ears
傷官|滿.text: Presentations, pitches, the stage — the room is ready to hear you today, so show your ideas at full volume. But today's fire cuts both ways: one joke at someone else's expense and the whole performance is wasted.

傷官|平.title: Make the brilliant practical
傷官|平.text: A brilliant idea only counts when it works in the real world, and today is for bringing the futuristic down to earth. Writing and editing flow smoothly, and trading ideas with sharp peers is so much fun you'll lose track of time.

傷官|定.title: Smooth talker — get it in writing
傷官|定.text: Your silver tongue can close the deal today, but do not let it end at words. Whatever you agree, write it down immediately, and make the scope painfully clear. Today's charm is next month's double-edged sword.

傷官|執.title: Polish until it cuts
傷官|執.text: The stalled draft, the content stuck in the pipeline — sit down today and finish them one piece at a time. Your eye catches flaws you missed yesterday, and three more revision rounds won't tire you. Today, the more you polish, the sharper it gets.

傷官|破.title: Your mouth is the fuse
傷官|破.text: Criticism of the boss, the elders, or the company rules — keep it inside today. Said out loud, it's a bomb. If you're itching to tear something apart, go tear down the old stuff that genuinely deserves the dumpster. Far more useful.

傷官|危.title: Brilliant idea, thin ice
傷官|危.text: Today's idea really is ahead of its time — but the ground underneath isn't solid yet. Don't make the big announcement. Check the legal side, the rules, the copyrights first. A good thing launched at the wrong moment turns bad instantly.

傷官|成.title: The idea that makes your name
傷官|成.text: The unconventional work finally launches, and the world is ready to see that you're different. The style people once called strange is now your signature. Take the compliments in full — no false modesty.

傷官|收.title: Get paid for your ideas
傷官|收.text: Idea fees, royalties, the overdue creative invoices — collect them all today. Close the job and fold the work into your portfolio. What you think up has a price, and today is payday.

傷官|開.title: Show the world
傷官|開.text: The new campaign, the new channel, the innovation you built in secret — launch today and the noise is the good kind. Your nerve to speak up and show off is a magnet today. The more genuine, the stronger the pull.

傷官|閉.title: Let the idea ripen
傷官|閉.text: Write down every good idea that surfaces today, but don't release any of them — they're not ripe yet. Skip posting anything sensitive too. The world doesn't need to know what you're thinking. When the time comes, it will make its own noise.
